emails.subject: ILA/ESMA conflicts
emails.body: ILA/ESMA conflicts What is your preference when there is a conflict between the interim agreement and the last draft (v23) of the ESMA. (For instance, the definition of ancillary services.) Shall I just ignore the ILA, or does it represent the customers' expectations? Kay

emails.subject: RE: ILA/ESMA conflicts
emails.body: RE: ILA/ESMA conflicts Kay, note the discrepencies and we will deal with on a case-by-case basis. I think the definition for Ancillary Services in the ESMA is the correct one; however, they are pretty close. To: Rorschach, Reagan; Fairley, David; Kroll, Heather; May, Tom; Coulter, Kayne

emails.subject: RE: ILA/ESMA conflicts
